title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Life Insurance Corporation Act, 1956. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 1st July, 1956, vide notification No. S. R. O. 1456, dated 26th June, 1956, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3.
